name: Insane Popes (South Side)
description: The South Side Almighty Insane Popes are a mostly Caucasian-American People Nation street gang in Chicago, formed in the mid-1970s as a branch of the North Side Popes. After nation leader Larry 'Larkin' Morris was killed by Gaylords in 1975, the south side branch became a renegade faction — joining the rival People Nation because they hated Folk-affiliated Satan Disciples and Two-Six. Completely severed ties with North Side Popes. Allied with Latin Kings, Black P. Stones, 12th Street Players, and Gaylords. Active territory in McKinley Park, Hale Park, Vittum Park, and Mt. Greenwood as of 2022.

sources.title: Insane Popes (South Side) - Chicago Gang History
